mapper.select: SELECT usage_id, equipment_asset_id, dormitory_id, room_id, employee_id, usage_start_date, usage_end_date, usage_quantity, remarks, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM equipment_usage WHERE usage_id = #{usageId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT eu.usage_id, eu.equipment_asset_id, e.name AS equipment_name, ea.purchase_quantity, eu.dormitory_id, d.name AS dormitory_name, eu.room_id, r.room_name AS room_name, eu.employee_id, emp.name AS employee_name, eu.usage_start_date, eu.usage_end_date, eu.usage_quantity, eu.remarks, eu.created_at, eu.updated_at FROM equipment_usage eu INNER JOIN equipment_asset ea ON ea.equipment_asset_id = eu.equipment_asset_id AND ea.deleted_at IS NULL INNER JOIN equipment e ON e.equipment_id = ea.equipment_id AND e.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN dormitory d ON d.dormitory_id = eu.dormitory_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN room r ON r.room_id = eu.room_id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN employee emp ON emp.employee_id = eu.employee_id AND emp.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY eu.usage_start_date DESC, eu.usage_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
